[`var completeCount: UInt32`](/documentation/iousbhost/iousbhostisochronousframe/completecount)The number of bytes that the system actually transferred for the frame.[`var requestCount: UInt32`](/documentation/iousbhost/iousbhostisochronousframe/requestcount)The number of requested bytes to transfer for the frame.[`var status: IOReturn`](/documentation/iousbhost/iousbhostisochronousframe/status)The completion status for an individual frame.[`var timeStamp: IOUSBHostTime`](/documentation/iousbhost/iousbhostisochronousframe/timestamp)The observed time for the frame’s completion.
